_comment: A1 WORKED EXAMPLE (roadmap Phase 1). Linear trade-ETL pipeline using the columnar ArrowCalculators. Messages are BATCH ENVELOPES: {"batch": [trade, trade, ...]}. Each Arrow calculator vectorizes the whole batch and is output-identical to its perftest.etl_calculators row counterpart. Uses in-memory queues so it runs with no Kafka; swap the subscriber/publisher to kafka:// for a broker-fed run. The engine itself is unchanged - these are ordinary custom calculators referenced by dotted path. See docs/A1_ARROW_WHEN_TO_USE.md and run with: python -m perftest.run_worked_example
name: perftest_arrow_etl
description: in-memory -> arrow FX -> arrow notional -> arrow fees -> arrow risk -> in-memory sink. Columnar batched equivalent of the numeric core of perftest_trade_etl, for the A1 worked example.

config._note: Each message is a batch envelope {"batch": [...]}. Point at kafka://topic/... for a broker-fed run.
Emits enriched batch envelopes. A real sink would flatten to one message per row (see the A1 'next increment' notes).
